'''Smashbone fever''' was a disease that caused the ligaments in a being's body to tear violently, literally smashing the [[Bone/Legends|bones]] when they ruptured. The disease was believed to be caused by a microorganism that was neither bacteria nor [[virus]], and was considered about fifty percent [[Death/Legends|fatal]] even when treated with muscle relaxants. Although there was no known cure for the disease, it sometimes went into remission; but it could still reappear later in life.

*''[[MedStar II: Jedi Healer]]''
